pages:
PeopleFlow HR Systems Ltd.
Investor Snapshot | Vertical SaaS - Human Capital Management
Quarter Ended: Q4 2024 | Reporting Currency: GBP
PeopleFlow HR Systems Ltd. ("PeopleFlow") is a vertical SaaS company providing human capital management tools to
professional services firms in the UK and Ireland. The platform spans core HR, performance management, payroll integration, and
analytics.
Key Metrics - Q4 2024
Metric (GBP unless noted) Q4 2024
Quarterly Revenue 4.4M
Subscription ARR (end of period) 18.3M
Gross Margin 74%
Net Dollar Retention (LTM) 116%
Annual Logo Churn 4.5%
Paying Customer Logos 379
Avg. Seats per Customer 141
Total Headcount 88
Commentary
PeopleFlow delivered Quarterly Revenue of 4.4M in Q4 2024, with end-of-period Subscription ARR reaching 18.3M. Gross Margin
was 74%, consistent with the prior-period target range. Headcount additions in Q4 were concentrated in customer success and
product. Average seats per customer of 141 reflects steady module adoption across performance and analytics.
Non-Core Financial Items
- Share-based compensation expense: 0.33M
- No material FX or restructuring items in Q4 2024.
(1) All figures in GBP unless otherwise stated.
(2) Net Dollar Retention (LTM) is computed in GBP; the label is maintained for cross-portfolio comparability.
(3) Logo Churn is annualised on a last-twelve-months basis.
(4) Gross Margin reflects cloud hosting and third-party data costs only; excludes customer success.
